text: UAE CBUAE Law requires fintech firms to regularise licensing by September 2026
DFSA updates crypto token regulatory framework effective January 2026
UAE Securities regulator rebranded as Capital Market Authority from January 2026
UAE telecoms group du launches $50M fintech and AI venture fund
Saudi Arabia achieves 79% cashless transaction rate surpassing 2025 target early
SAMA licenses Lite Advanced Financial Company for e-wallet services in Saudi Arabia
Alipay+ receives SAMA approval to go live in Saudi Arabia in 2026
Alipay+ to operate on mada rails connecting 1.7 billion user accounts
Saudi Arabia targets 525 fintech companies by 2030 under SAMA framework
Kudo.com granted UAE licence for promotion and introduction activities June 2026
